footer.description: Precision digital marketing for dentists who want a full schedule of qualified patients — with zero management on your part.

home.heroTitle: A Full Schedule of Qualified Patients.
home.heroSubtitle: We attract high-value patients to your dental practice — while you focus on what you do best: caring for smiles.

faqs.question: How long until I see the first patients?
faqs.answer: Most of our dentist clients start receiving qualified patients within the first 2 to 4 weeks after activation.

faqs.question: Do I need to create content or manage anything?
faqs.answer: No. We create all the content, manage the campaigns, optimize the profiles and produce the reports.

faqs.question: How does territorial exclusivity work?
faqs.answer: We accept only one practice per specialty per defined region. Your direct competitor will never be our client.

home.ctaSubtitle: The diagnosis is free, no commitment required, and shows exactly where the patients you're not reaching are.

about.title: We're Not a Generic Agency.
about.subtitle: LK Digital exists to solve a specific problem: excellent dentists who don't receive the patients they deserve — because no one can find them online.
about.beliefText1: Brazilian dentistry has a paradox: extremely qualified professionals with half-empty schedules. The problem is almost never the quality of service. It's visibility.
about.beliefText2: We were born to solve this. Not with vague promises of 'more followers' or 'branding', but with a measurable system that puts qualified patients in your chair — week after week.
about.beliefText3: Every dollar invested must generate a return. Every strategy must be backed by data. And every dentist who works with us must feel they have a dedicated marketing team.

values.desc: Every campaign, every piece of content, and every optimization is based on data from your region, specialty and competition.
One practice per specialty per region. Your direct competitor will never be our client.
You know exactly what is being done, how much it costs, and what results it is generating.

whyDentistry.title: We know advertising regulations
whyDentistry.desc: Dental advertising has specific rules. We know exactly what's allowed — because it's all we do.

whyDentistry.title: We understand the patient funnel
whyDentistry.desc: From the first Google search to sitting in the chair. Each stage has an optimized strategy.

whyDentistry.title: Real comparative data
whyDentistry.desc: Our benchmarks are from real dental practices — not e-commerce or restaurants.

whyDentistry.title: Patient vocabulary
whyDentistry.desc: We know what patients actually search for, not what textbooks say.
